title: Fast on the Draw
writer: Ron Ormond, Maurice Tombragel, Richard Martinsen
actors: James Ellison, Russell Hayden, Raymond Hatton
plot: When Shamrock was young, the Cat killed his parents. Now grown, Shamrock gets appointed Marshal when he breaks up a robbery attempt by Tex and his men. Tex works for the Cat and when he and his men rob the Express Office, Shamrock...
